name: Muse:Night Out
short_description: This is a game that unlocks girls by play paper scissor rock like games.
detailed_description:
New game released


About the Game

This is a game that unlocks girls by guessing numbers. If you are interested in our products, please pay attention to our group news:
If you feel the game is difficult, you can use items to make it easy.

7 bars to be unlock

You will enter 7 bars to go against the characters by playing guessing games. If you win, there will be a drinking war. Only after winning the drinking war can you get to date a girl.

15 characters with very different personalities

Each bar have their own pretty girls, try to conquer them all.

Photo booth

You can take photos in the date interface. Try shoot in different poses. create a photo of yourself with the virtual character. Remember to share it with everyone using F12.
